SELECT MAX(num_flights) FROM flights;

SELECT n.NeighborhoodName, COUNT(*) AS num_properties FROM Neighborhoods n JOIN Properties p ON n.NeighborhoodID = p.NeighborhoodID WHERE p.CoOwned = TRUE AND p.Sold >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR) GROUP BY n.NeighborhoodName;

SELECT SUM(te.Hours) FROM Attorneys a JOIN TimeEntries te ON a.AttorneyID = te.AttorneyID WHERE a.Name = 'John Doe';

SELECT type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM hospitals GROUP BY type UNION ALL SELECT type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM clinics GROUP BY type UNION ALL SELECT type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM long_term_care GROUP BY type;
SELECT gender, AVG(age) AS avg_age FROM patients WHERE flu_shot = TRUE AND YEAR(shot_date) = 2020 GROUP BY gender;
SELECT gender, SUM(num_screenings) AS total_screenings FROM cancer_screenings GROUP BY gender;

SELECT crop_name, SUM(production_tons) AS total_production FROM organic_crops WHERE country IN ('France', 'Germany', 'Italy', 'Spain', 'Poland', 'Netherlands', 'Belgium', 'Sweden', 'Denmark', 'Austria', 'Czech Republic', 'Hungary', 'Portugal', 'Romania', 'Bulgaria') GROUP BY crop_name;

SELECT sc.contract_address FROM smart_contracts sc JOIN transactions t ON sc.contract_address = t.contract_address WHERE sc.deployment_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY sc.contract_address HAVING COUNT(*) > 1000;
SELECT holder_id, address, SUM(balance) AS total_balance FROM token_holders WHERE asset_id = 1 GROUP BY holder_id, address ORDER BY total_balance DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT b.name, SUM(s.num_vehicles) AS total_vehicles FROM borough b JOIN stations s ON b.id = s.borough_id GROUP BY b.name;

SELECT AVG(salary) FROM worker_salaries WHERE sector = 'renewable energy' AND country IN ('US', 'Canada');

SELECT SUM(revenue) FROM hospitals WHERE location = 'rural' AND trauma_center = TRUE;
SELECT operation, threat, budget, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY CASE WHEN threat = 'High' THEN 1 WHEN threat = 'Medium' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, budget DESC) AS ranking FROM intel_ops_threat;
SELECT Department, SUM(CASE WHEN Gender != 'Male' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS diversity_ratio FROM Employees GROUP BY Department;

SELECT AVG(donation_amount) FROM donors WHERE donor_country = 'USA' AND YEAR(donation_date) = 2020;
SELECT continent, name FROM ethics_by_continent WHERE focus = 'Ethical AI';
SELECT trip_date, line_name, SUM(num_passengers) AS daily_ridership FROM train_trip GROUP BY trip_date, line_name;
SELECT AVG(distance) AS avg_distance, AVG(frequency) AS avg_frequency FROM route WHERE distance > 7 AND frequency >= 120;
UPDATE Manufacturers SET GOTS = 'Yes' WHERE Region = 'Africa';
SELECT producer, SUM(quantity) AS total_quantity FROM ethical_materials GROUP BY producer;
SELECT Material, MIN(SustainabilityScore) AS min_score FROM TextileSources GROUP BY Material;
SELECT country, COUNT(*) AS client_count FROM socially_responsible_loans GROUP BY country;

SELECT fi.institution_name, SUM(l.amount) AS total_loans FROM financial_institutions fi JOIN loans l ON fi.institution_id = l.institution_id WHERE l.loan_type = 'Shariah-compliant' GROUP BY fi.institution_name;
SELECT SUM(income) FROM clients WHERE country = 'Canada' AND is_socially_responsible_investor = TRUE;

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Donations WHERE DonorID NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT DonorID FROM Donations WHERE DonationDate < DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH)) AND DonationDate >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM volunteers WHERE program = 'Education' AND YEAR(volunteer_date) = 2021;
SELECT p.pname, SUM(d.amount) AS total_donations FROM program p JOIN donation d ON p.pid = d.pid WHERE d.donation_date BETWEEN '2022-01-01' AND '2022-03-31' GROUP BY p.pname;
SELECT ProgramName, AVG(DonationAmount) AS avg_donation FROM Programs GROUP BY ProgramName ORDER BY avg_donation;
DELETE FROM FoodSafetyRecords.PerishableGoods WHERE bestBeforeDate < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY);
INSERT INTO food_safety_records (id, location, inspection_date, violation_count) VALUES (1, 'A123', CURDATE(), 0), (2, 'B456', CURDATE(), 0), (3, 'C789', CURDATE(), 0);
SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN m.calories >= m.daily_recommended_intake THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage FROM meals m JOIN customers c ON m.customer_id = c.id WHERE c.country = 'Indonesia';
SELECT w.city, COUNT(s.id) AS shipment_count FROM Warehouse w JOIN Shipments s ON w.id = s.warehouse_id WHERE s.shipped_date BETWEEN '2021-01-01' AND '2021-03-31' GROUP BY w.city;
SELECT AVG(transit_time) FROM ground_freight_routes WHERE origin = 'Toronto' AND destination = 'Montreal';
SELECT country, COUNT(*) AS biosensor_count FROM biosensors GROUP BY country;

INSERT INTO Research_Grants (Grant_ID, Grant_Title, Start_Date, End_Date, Grant_Amount, Grant_Status) VALUES (30, 'Artificial Intelligence for Healthcare', '2023-01-01', '2025-12-31', 1200000, 'Active');
SELECT country, COUNT(*) AS initiative_count FROM smart_city_initiatives GROUP BY country;
SELECT AVG(sr.rating) FROM site_ratings sr JOIN site_info si ON sr.site_id = si.site_id WHERE si.country = 'Egypt';

SELECT AVG(vt.views) AS avg_engagement FROM hotels h JOIN virtual_tours vt ON h.hotel_id = vt.hotel_id WHERE h.country IN ('France', 'Germany', 'Italy', 'Spain', 'United Kingdom', 'Netherlands', 'Belgium', 'Sweden', 'Portugal', 'Austria');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM art_collection WHERE style = 'French Impressionist';
SELECT AVG(a.price) FROM Artworks a WHERE a.artist_nationality = 'African';
SELECT SUM(value) FROM ArtPieces WHERE style = 'Surrealism';
SELECT construction_year, COUNT(*) AS num_bridges, SUM(cost) AS total_cost FROM bridge_projects WHERE location = 'Pacific Northwest' GROUP BY construction_year;
SELECT Name, Type FROM Bridges WHERE State = 'California';
SELECT AVG(budget) FROM Projects;
SELECT continent, COUNT(*) AS initiative_count FROM Sustainable_Initiatives_Global GROUP BY continent;

SELECT (t2.number_of_tourists - t1.number_of_tourists) * 100.0 / t1.number_of_tourists AS pct_change FROM tourism t1 JOIN tourism t2 ON t1.host_country = t2.host_country AND t1.visitor_country = t2.visitor_country WHERE t1.host_country = 'Japan' AND t1.visitor_country = 'India' AND MONTH(t1.date) = 3 AND MONTH(t2.date) = 4;
SELECT initiative, country, launch_date FROM historical_legal_tech WHERE launch_date >= '2010-01-01';
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM (SELECT id FROM marine_life_research_stations WHERE region = 'Southern Ocean' UNION ALL SELECT id FROM pollution_control_initiatives WHERE region = 'Southern Ocean') t;
SELECT SUM(di.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM dish_ingredients di JOIN ingredients i ON di.ingredient = i.ingredient WHERE i.is_local = TRUE;
SELECT risk_level FROM geopolitical_risks_2 WHERE country = 'Country Y' AND year = 2021;
SELECT city, COUNT(*) AS customer_count FROM mobile_customers GROUP BY city;
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT source) FROM articles WHERE category = 'investigative_journalism';
SELECT (SELECT ph FROM ocean_ph WHERE location = 'Atlantic Ocean') - (SELECT ph FROM ocean_ph WHERE location = 'Pacific Ocean') AS acidity_difference;
